course.title: Agentic System Design
course.subtitle: Engineering reliable systems around the LLM. 46 lectures across 3 parts. One production system built brick by brick — then explained on a whiteboard.
course.thesis: Stop treating the LLM as a black box. Treat it as one unreliable component in a distributed system, and engineer the system around it.

parts.label: Concepts
parts.title: How LLMs Became Agents
parts.blurb: The 6-decade setup compressed into 6 lectures. Story-mode. Sets the foundations.

chapters.title: Foundations
chapters.description: How LLMs evolved into agents — the foundational concepts.

lectures.title: What's Inside an LLM? An Engineer's Honest Manual

parts.label: Engineering
parts.title: Engineering Real Agentic Systems
parts.blurb: Build a production agent on AWS, brick by brick. Each chapter opens with a problem the previous chapter created.

chapters.title: Design Discipline
chapters.description: Estimate the math, write the spec, pick the right primitive — and learn the pattern vocabulary the field uses.

chapters.title: Reliability and Memory
chapters.description: Tools, retries, memory systems, vector retrieval.

chapters.title: Dev to Prod
chapters.description: Local testing and the realities of production deployment.

chapters.title: Evaluation
chapters.description: Treat evals as specs. Sub-evals, LLM-as-judge, evaluator-optimizer loops, production feedback.

chapters.title: Observability and Cost
chapters.description: Tracing, alerting, and the economics of inference.

chapters.title: Security, Safety, Human-in-the-loop
chapters.description: Threat models, prompt injection, agent identity, approval gates.

chapters.title: Multi-Agent and Interop
chapters.description: Coordinating multiple agents · consensus voting · search-and-vote sampling family · MCP and A2A interop.

chapters.title: Frameworks
chapters.description: LangGraph, Mastra, Vercel AI SDK, Claude Agent SDK compared.

chapters.title: Streaming and Live Chat
chapters.description: Real-time agent responses with WebSockets, buffering, interrupts.

chapters.title: Infrastructure
chapters.description: IaC, deployment pipelines, scheduled and event-driven execution.

chapters.title: Case Studies
chapters.description: Deconstructing AI Digest, Claude Code, Deep Research.

chapters.title: Capstone
chapters.description: AI Digest v∞ — the final production iteration.

parts.label: Interview
parts.title: The Agentic System Design Interview
parts.blurb: You can build it. Now explain it on a whiteboard. Senior interviews now ask 'design Cursor' and 'design Deep Research' — here's the framework, plus worked problems on real interview asks.

chapters.title: The Interview
chapters.description: The 5-step framework for AI system design interviews · worked problems re-cast from case studies as live whiteboard talks.
chapters.lockedReason: Activates after Eps 1–43 are recorded — the worked problems re-cast Eps 41 + 42 case-study material.
